# FoodNote

> Weight-loss planning and calorie tracking with AI-assisted meal logging. A single user plans a goal, logs weight and meals, and tracks progress on a dashboard.

FoodNote lets people describe a meal in plain language and get calories and macros back in seconds via AI parsing, log body weight as an append-only journal, and follow a personalized daily Calorie Target paced toward a goal, never below a safety floor of 1,200 kcal (female) / 1,500 kcal (male). Calorie math is based on the Mifflin-St Jeor equation.

## Product

- [Homepage](/): public marketing page, unauthenticated.
- [Register](/register): create an account.
- [Login](/login): sign in.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): daily calories remaining, weight trend, recent meals (requires an account).

## Notes for automated agents

- The API lives under `/api/*` on the same origin; it is not a public/third-party API and is not documented here.
- This file describes the product for AI assistants and crawlers; it is not a Terms of Service or a machine-readable API spec.
